title: Return to Point of Origin - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Return to Point of Origin 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth urn to Point of Origin Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF PORTLAND HOME REUNIFICATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a family reunification program that offers one-time transportation assistance to a safe, stable housing destination outside the City of Portland. 1120 SW 5th Avenue Suite 114 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Homeless individuals and families with children age 18 and younger who have access to safe, stable housing outside the City of Portland Hours: 7 days per week 7am-8pm Email 311 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE HOME FREE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bus tickets via Greyhound to transport eligible individuals from where they currently are to a location where family or a safe adult is. Locations must be accessible by Greyhound transportation services. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-21 who are away from home and do not have a safe way to return Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 786-2929 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND HOME REUNIFICATION PROGRAM
